title: Endless of Heart
description: Adds the environments of Minecraft Dungeons' Echoing Void to the base game
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd8fabc1bf6e0cc681c8ef4a20111ee3091434de.png)

**Endless of Heart** is a dimension mod that adds the environments
& biomes of Minecraft Dungeons' Echoing Void DLC.

**CONTENT**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

BIOMES
End Wilds
The generic yellow forest. Boulders & ravines of End Stone and Endurite cover the terrain. Pharloom Trees curl into themselves and Chorus Trees branch up and out. Chorus also grows here.

Chorus Forest
The generic magenta forest. An overgrowth of Chorus tints the End Stone surface. Choral grass resembles that of the Overworld oceans. Young Chorus saplings also spawn. Coraline boulders and ravines also generate.

End Bogs
A dead coral reef. Gilded Coral resembles that of the Overworld oceans. Pools and mounds of End Mud and Sludge cover the surface.

Obsidian Caverns
A familiar but voided biome. Columns of obsidian Coroite collect on the surface, covering layers of Endurite. Void pools will birth and destroy the very Enderlings of the dimension.

MOBS
Endersent spawn rarely in modded and vanilla End biomes. They throw aggressors into the air on melee.
Watchling will not hesitate to attack players, no matter on eye contact.
Blastling blast their aggressors with Void Fire.
Snareling throw balls of acidic goop at their target, inflicting poison.

MECHANICS
Ichorite spawns in pillars in Obsidian Caverns and End Wilds. Ichorite can be smelted and used to craft Checkpoints, which will set a one time respawn point in any dimension. Ender Communicators can link to Checkpoints to teleport instantly. Ichorite can also be crafted into Ender Keystones, used for End Portal Frames.
Shulkers can be built by Purpur Blocks, End Stone, and Pumpkins. They will attack all kinds of the same mob that the owner attacks. They can also be dyed.

Pitch is a block that can be placed on all sides inside a block. Pitch tints to the map color of a block underneath the layer.

Void Touched is a negative effect inflicted by Void Liquid, which multiplies the amount of damage received per moment damaged.

</details>



Join the Redev discord for developments & updates - https://discord.gg/jWN5cduHkT

Happy exploring!
